skill1.kitLine: Activates after landing 30 normal attacks. Affects the target. Deals 131.34% of final ATK as additional damage.
skill1.where: skill1[0]: trigger hitCount 30 → target enemy → flatDamage 131.34
skill1.note: Crits at sheet rate by engine default; no core-strike (text silent); FB-exempt by TIMING per prior-2 rule; noRange automatic.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies. Effects vary according to the number of times entered. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it: Once: Cooldown of Burst Skill ▼1.82s. Twice: ▼2.2s. Three times: ▼2.6s.
skill1.where: skill1[1]: trigger fullBurstEnter → target allies → escalating [burstCdr 1.82, 2.2, 2.6]
skill1.note: 'Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it' = escalating semantics (steps 1..N on Nth entry). Implemented, not unmodeled. Rotation blast radius touches every teammate's burst cadence — verify via /sim-battery diff.

skill2.kitLine: Affects 1 enemy unit(s) randomly. Deals 105.58% of final ATK as damage.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: trigger hitCount 30 → target enemy → flatDamage 105.58
skill2.note: ⚑ TOP: trigger is INVENTED — kit prose has NO 'Activates when…' clause. Anchored to S1's 30-normal cadence as sibling-pattern guess. Could be burst-driven, a different N, or once-per-activation of something else. Pure hypothesis.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when attacking an Electric Code target. Affects the target. Damage Taken ▲5.64%, stacks up to 5 time(s) and lasts for 5 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1]: trigger bossElement Electric → target enemy → buff damageTakenPct 28.2
skill2.note: Steady-state collapse: 5.64×5 = 28.2 (AR continuous fire rebuilds 5 stacks in ~1s, 5s window ≫ refresh → ~full uptime). INERT under scope-lock (boss is not Electric). Per-stack accrual unexpressible in engine; steady-state is the faithful encoding.

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Deals 164.83% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.
burst.where: burst[0]: trigger burstCast → target enemy → flatDamage 164.83
burst.note: Burst-cast auto FB-exempt, snapshots pre-FB. Single boss so 'all enemies' = the target.

burst.kitLine: Activates when attacking an Electric Code target. Affects the target. Deals 164.83% of final ATK as additional damage.
burst.where: burst[1]: trigger burstCast + bossElementGate Electric → target enemy → flatDamage 164.83
burst.note: Caveat 2 confirms 'now modeled'. INERT under scope-lock (boss not Electric). Note text still says 'UNMODELED' — stale; the block and caveat supersede it. Would add +164.83%/burst vs an Electric boss.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the 105.58% random-enemy hit has NO kit-stated trigger — modeled on Skill 1's 30-normal-attack cadence as an unmeasured guess
documentedConfounds.why: Invented trigger+cadence (hitCount 30) is pure hypothesis. If the real trigger is burst-driven or a different N, the 105.58% hit fires at the wrong frequency, directly shifting damage.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: the extra 164.83% vs Electric Code targets is now modeled (burstCast + bossElementGate 'Electric'); inert vs the non-Electric scope-lock boss
documentedConfounds.why: Scope-lock boss is not Electric, so this block never fires. Zero impact on current grading context.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the Damage Taken debuff only applies against Electric Code bosses (inert in the scope-lock context)
documentedConfounds.why: bossElement gate is Electric; scope-lock boss is not Electric. Block never fires. Zero impact.

documentedConfounds.text: cadence: assault-rifle fire rate and reload timing are datamined defaults, not yet measured from video
documentedConfounds.why: AR fire rate + reload timing drive hitCount cadence, which gates both S1a (131.34%) and the invented S2a (105.58%) triggers. Wrong cadence = wrong proc frequency = systematic damage error.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑[3] S2b steady-state 28.2 uptime assumption — untestable under scope-lock (needs an Electric boss)
documentedConfounds.why: Inert under scope-lock. Only relevant if an Electric-boss context is ever graded.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑[5] burstCdr rotation blast radius — /sim-battery diff before any board-level claim
documentedConfounds.why: Methodology concern: the escalating burstCdr touches every teammate's burst cadence. Not a per-unit damage error but a team-rotation interaction that needs differential testing.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number.
documentedConfounds.why: Entire file is an unvalidated hypothesis. No measurement has been done. Any or all ⚑ estimates could be wrong.

authorIntentSummary: The override is a parser-baseline hypothesis (not yet measured or hand-tuned) modeling all 6 kit lines as blocks. S1a is a straightforward hitCount-30 rider; S1b implements the escalating burstCdr with correct 'each subsequent triggers all prior' semantics. S2a's trigger is the riskiest invention — the kit prose has NO activation clause, so the author guessed hitCount 30 by analogy with S1a. S2b collapses the 5-stack Damage Taken debuff to a steady-state 28.2% behind an Electric element gate (inert under scope-lock). Both burst lines are modeled, with the Electric-gated rider using bossElementGate. The two Electric-gated blocks (S2b, Bb) are faithfully inert against the non-Electric scope-lock boss. The top risks are the invented S2a trigger and the unmeasured AR cadence tuple.
